title: Balanced Nourishment
subtitle: Rebuilding strength with stability
description: At this stage, appetite may begin to feel more stable and nausea may reduce slightly. This allows you to gradually return to more balanced and complete meals, supporting your energy and overall well-being.
what_to_expect: Improvement in appetite and food tolerance
Reduction in nausea for many individuals
Better ability to maintain regular eating patterns
nutrition_focus: Return to balanced and regular meals
Include a variety of food groups
recommended_foods: Balanced meals like dal, roti, rice, and sabzi
Fruits like banana, apple, papaya, and orange
Vegetables including spinach, carrots, and beans
Protein sources like curd, paneer, lentils, and eggs (if preferred)
hydration: Drink water consistently throughout the day
Include fluids like buttermilk, coconut water, or fresh lemon water
reassurance: As your appetite stabilizes, balanced meals can help you feel stronger and more energized.

diabetes.personalized_description: Consistent and balanced meals support stable energy and blood sugar levels.
nutrition_focus: Avoid large fluctuations in meal portions
recommended_foods: Whole grains like oats and brown rice
Protein-rich foods like lentils and paneer
diabetes.reassurance: Regular and balanced meals help maintain stability.

anemia.personalized_description: Improved appetite allows better inclusion of iron-rich foods for strength.
nutrition_focus: Pair meals with vitamin C sources
foods_to_limit: Tea or coffee immediately after meals
anemia.reassurance: Balanced meals can help build your energy steadily.

hypertension.personalized_description: Balanced meals with controlled salt intake support stable blood pressure.
nutrition_focus: Keep meals balanced and moderate in salt
hypertension.reassurance: Consistent meals support a calm and balanced routine.

thyroid.personalized_description: A steady and balanced diet supports overall metabolic stability.
nutrition_focus: Include a balanced variety of nutrients
thyroid.reassurance: Consistency and balance support your body's needs.

multi_condition_blend.combined_message: When managing multiple conditions, balanced meals and consistent routines help maintain stability and comfort.
priority_nutrition: Avoid skipping meals or irregular eating
multi_condition_blend.reassurance: Steady and balanced nourishment supports your overall well-being.
